personal.name: Syed Dawood
personal.title: AI Automation Engineer | Generative AI & Backend Systems
personal.headline: AI/ML Engineer and Full-Stack Developer
personal.about: AI/ML Engineer and Full-Stack Developer with over 2 years of hands-on experience across internships and professional roles building production-ready AI systems. Strong background in Python and modern full-stack frameworks, including Next.js and Nest.js. Specialized in building Agentic AI automation systems, custom RAG pipelines, enterprise LLM integrations using OpenAI, Gemini, and LangChain, and scalable backend architectures. Passionate about building intelligent systems that are innovative and have a real-world impact.

bullets: Architect and deploy scalable backend services using Nest.js to power AI-driven automation workflows and LLM-based systems.
Design and implement end-to-end AI architectures integrating OpenAI and Google Gemini models into production applications.
Engineer Agentic AI automation systems using LangChain and LangGraph to orchestrate multi-step LLM reasoning workflows.
Develop secure REST APIs and backend logic to support frontend integration and AI feature delivery.
Deploy, monitor, and maintain production applications on cloud infrastructure, ensuring system reliability and performance.
Developed AI-powered recruitment automation systems to streamline candidate screening and hiring workflows.
Designed and implemented intelligent resume filtering pipelines leveraging LLMs for requirement-based candidate matching.
Built scalable backend services in Python to support AI-driven automation tools and recruiter dashboards.
Built an Agentic AI chatbot to automate resume filtering based on dynamic recruiter-defined criteria.
Integrated OpenAI and Google Gemini models using LangChain to enable intelligent candidate analysis and evaluation.
Developed interactive Streamlit dashboards to enhance recruiter usability and decision-making efficiency.
Integrated GPT-3.5-Turbo into enterprise web applications.
Designed document-aware chatbot solutions using Azure OpenAI and custom RAG-style pipelines.
Developed backend integrations using Azure services to enable secure document ingestion and contextual AI responses.
Deployed AI applications on Microsoft Azure infrastructure.

education.degree: Bachelor of Information Technology, in Computer Science
education.awards: 3 Vice Chancellor Awards and 5 Dean's Honor List Awards
